title: Amtech B3770 Staple Gun
features: EASY TO USE: This handy staple gun has an ergonomically designed grip and an 'easy squeeze operation', making it ideal for one-handed operation
VERSATILE: Suitable for use with crown staples with a leg length between 4mm - 8mm, it is supplied with 500 6mm staples and is ideal for a wide range of household and DIY jobs
STAPLES INCLUDED: It is supplied with 500 6mm staples
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: BACKED BY AMTECH S Backed by Amtech’s 3-year guarantee with UK-based aftercare.
description: From the manufacturer staple gun Handy staple gun for one hand operation For use with crown staples with 4 – 8mm leg length Ergonomically designed grip and easy squeeze operation Suitable for a wide range of household and D.I.Y. applications Supplied with approx 500pc 6mm staples See More
